lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: This is the northernmost reach of Kourend. Beyond these cliffs you will find the Doors of Dinh and the prison of the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: The Pyromancers do what they can to keep the Wintertodt contained but I fear it will not be enough.

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: I come here to keep watch, whenever my time permits, so that the city may be warned if the Wintertodt escapes.

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: This is the northernmost reach of Kourend. Beyond these cliffs you will find the Doors of Dinh and the prison of the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: The Pyromancers do what they can to keep the Wintertodt contained but I fear it will not be enough.

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: I come here to keep watch, whenever my time permits, so that the city may be warned if the Wintertodt escapes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About this circle of dead mushrooms...

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: You know very little of such circles, traveller. Perhaps one day we will have more to discuss. Now, can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: Yes, the circle is dead. Crops die quite often, according to the Hosidius peasants. Do you wish me to reanimate it? I can, for a mere 80,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: In that case the circle will remain dead. Now, can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: There, the deed is done. Now, can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Trossa
lines.text: In that case the circle will remain dead. Now, can I help you with anything else?
